move_black_garment_to_upper_left.query: the worker repeatedly lifts one black garment clear of the center workspace with both hands and carries it to the growing pile at the upper-left of the table, before pulling a different garment toward the sewing machine

spread_garment_in_front_of_sewing_machin.query: the worker pulls a black garment from the upper work area down toward their body with both hands and opens it flat across the center table directly in front of the sewing machine

align_garment_edge_layers.query: after spreading the black garment flat, the worker uses both hands at the near edge to pinch the two fabric layers together and match their edges before taking them to the presser foot

feed_garment_edge_under_presser_foot.query: the worker brings the already aligned black garment edge from the center table to the sewing-machine needle and pushes that edge directly beneath the presser foot
